history.text: Write a highly detailed, descriptive prompt of this image in English for an AI text-to-image generator (such as Midjourney, DALL-E, or Stable Diffusion). Describe the objects, background, style, lighting, color palette, and mood in detail. Do NOT include any introductory or concluding conversational text. Do not say 'Here is the prompt' or similar. Output ONLY the raw description of the image.

A very wet, fluffy baby owl with large, dark, sad eyes and a tiny beak, looking directly at the camera with a forlorn expression. Its feathers are matted and appear damp, clinging to its small body. The owl is perched on a rough, dark brown log, with sharp talons visible. The background is a soft-focus blur of green grass and foliage, suggesting an outdoor, natural environment. The lighting is somewhat diffused, possibly overcast, creating a slightly melancholic atmosphere. The color palette is dominated by muted greens, browns, and the owl's natural speckled brown and white plumage. The overall mood is one of vulnerability and slight distress.
